name: nexa-doc-hub
description: Production-ready document management system with MERN stack

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.test: npm run backend:test && npm run frontend:test
scripts.lint: npm run backend:lint && npm run frontend:lint
scripts.lint:fix: npm run backend:lint:fix && npm run frontend:lint:fix
scripts.security:audit: npm audit && cd backend && npm audit && cd ../frontend && npm audit
scripts.security:fix: npm audit fix && cd backend && npm audit fix && cd ../frontend && npm audit fix

author: Your Name
